mapper.select: SELECT NVL(TO_CHAR(u.KS_ID), 'none') AS KS_ID , NVL(u.KS_NAME, 'none') AS KS_NAME , NVL(u.KS_DML_ACCESS, 'N') AS KS_DML_ACCESS , NVL(u.KS_FACTORY_ACCESS, 'ALL') AS KS_FACTORY_ACCESS FROM( SELECT KS_ID, KS_NAME, KS_DML_ACCESS, KS_FACTORY_ACCESS FROM T_WMS_USER WHERE UPPER(KS_ID) = UPPER(#{userId}) AND KS_PASSWD = #{userPw} AND KS_WMSLOGINYN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1 ) u RIGHT JOIN DUAL ON 1 = 1
SELECT count(*) from t_wms_user where (UPPER(ks_factory_access) = UPPER(#{factory}) OR UPPER(ks_factory_access) = 'ALL') and UPPER(KS_ID) = UPPER(#{userId})

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY t.ks_indate DESC) AS rn FROM ( SELECT b.bu_name, a.ks_name, a.ks_id, a.ks_sabun, a.ks_indate, a.ks_wmsloginyn, a.ks_factory_access, a.ks_factory FROM t_wms_user a LEFT OUTER JOIN c_busor b ON a.ks_busor = b.bu_code WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY a.ks_busor, a.ks_name ) t ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{offset} + #{itemsPerPage}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_wms_user a LEFT OUTER JOIN c_busor b ON a.ks_busor = b.bu_code WHERE 1=1

SELECT ROLE_ID, MENU_CODE FROM T_WMS_ROLE_PERMISSION WHERE USEYN = 'Y' AND ROLE_ID IN
#{roleId}
mapper.update: UPDATE T_WMS_USER_ROLE SET USEYN = 'N' WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND ROLE_ID <> 'MANAGER' AND USEYN = 'Y'

MERGE INTO T_WMS_USER_ROLE A USING ( SELECT #{userId} AS USER_ID, 'MANAGER' AS ROLE_ID, 'Y' AS USEYN FROM DUAL ) B ON (A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.ROLE_ID = B.ROLE_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET USEYN = 'Y' WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (USER_ID, ROLE_ID, USEYN) VALUES (B.USER_ID, B.ROLE_ID, B.USEYN)
mapper.select: SELECT ROLE_ID FROM T_WMS_USER_ROLE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND USEYN = 'Y'
mapper.update: MERGE INTO T_WMS_USER_ROLE A USING ( SELECT #{userId} AS USER_ID, #{roleId} AS ROLE_ID, 'Y' AS USEYN FROM DUAL ) B ON (A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.ROLE_ID = B.ROLE_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET USEYN = 'Y' WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (USER_ID, ROLE_ID, USEYN) VALUES (B.USER_ID, B.ROLE_ID, B.USEYN)
mapper.select:
SELECT MENU_CODE FROM T_WMS_ROLE_PERMISSION WHERE USEYN = 'Y' AND ROLE_ID IN
#{roleId}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO T_WMS_USER_PERMISSION_OVERRIDE A USING ( SELECT #{userId} AS USER_ID, #{menuCode} AS MENU_CODE, 'Y' AS USEYN FROM DUAL ) B ON (A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.MENU_CODE = B.MENU_CODE) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET USEYN = 'Y' WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (USER_ID, MENU_CODE, USEYN) VALUES (B.USER_ID, B.MENU_CODE, B.USEYN)

MERGE INTO T_WMS_USER_PERMISSION_OVERRIDE A USING ( SELECT #{userId} AS USER_ID, #{menuCode} AS MENU_CODE, 'N' AS USEYN FROM DUAL ) B ON (A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.MENU_CODE = B.MENU_CODE) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET USEYN = 'N' WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (USER_ID, MENU_CODE, USEYN) VALUES (B.USER_ID, B.MENU_CODE, B.USEYN)
mapper.select: WITH ROLE_MENU AS ( SELECT DISTINCT B.MENU_CODE FROM T_WMS_USER_ROLE A JOIN T_WMS_ROLE_PERMISSION B ON A.ROLE_ID = B.ROLE_ID WHERE UPPER(A.LOGINID) = UPPER(#{id}) AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND B.USEYN = 'Y' ), FINAL_MENU AS ( SELECT A.MENU_CODE, CASE WHEN C.MENU_CODE IS NOT NULL THEN C.USEYN WHEN B.MENU_CODE IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS FINAL_USEYN FROM T_WMS_MENU A LEFT JOIN ROLE_MENU B ON A.MENU_CODE = B.MENU_CODE LEFT JOIN T_WMS_USER_PERMISSION_OVERRIDE C ON UPPER(C.LOGINID) = UPPER(#{id}) AND C.MENU_CODE = A.MENU_CODE WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' ) SELECT MENU_CODE FROM FINAL_MENU WHERE FINAL_USEYN = 'Y' ORDER BY MENU_CODE
select count(*) from t_wms_user where ks_wmsloginyn = 'Y' AND upper(ks_id) = upper(#{ks_id})
mapper.insert: insert into t_wms_user ( ks_id, ks_passwd, ks_busor, ks_wmsloginyn, ks_name, ks_indate, ks_inuser, ks_gubun, ks_factory ) values ( #{ks_id}, #{ks_passwd}, #{ks_busor}, 'Y', #{ks_name}, #{ks_indate}, #{ks_inuser}, '01', #{ks_factory} )
mapper.update: update t_wms_user set ks_passwd = #{pass}, ks_name = #{name} where ks_id = #{id}
update t_wms_user_menu_access set password = #{pass}, name = #{name} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT KS_NAME, KS_ID, KS_INDATE, KS_WMSLOGINYN, KS_FACTORY_ACCESS, KS_FACTORY, KS_BUSOR, KS_DML_ACCESS FROM T_WMS_USER WHERE KS_ID = #{id}

SELECT e.subname AS itemtype, b.subname AS car, a.itemcode, a.itemname, c.subname AS spec, a.spec AS custcode, cu.cu_sangho AS cname, f.close_customer, f.delivery_customer, f.delivery_location, f.labelinfo, f.label1, f.label2, f.label3, f.label4, f.label5 FROM t_mi_item a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub b ON a.carno = b.subcode AND b.typecode = 'MI041' LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON a.specno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI042' LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub d ON a.LABEL_COLOR = d.subcode AND d.typecode = 'MI046' LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub e ON a.cmb_itemtype = e.subcode AND e.typecode = 'MI002' LEFT OUTER JOIN T_WMS_ITEMINFO f ON a.itemcode = f.itemcode LEFT JOIN ( SELECT itemcode, MAX(custcode) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY condate DESC) AS custcode FROM t_mi_price_buycust GROUP BY itemcode ) p ON a.itemcode = p.itemcode LEFT JOIN c_cust cu ON cu.cu_code = p.custcode WHERE a.deldate = ' ' and e.subname is not null and a.branch = '001'
ORDER BY a.itemcode
mapper.update:
MERGE INTO T_WMS_ITEMINFO t USING (SELECT #{itemcode} AS ITEMCODE FROM DUAL) s ON (t.ITEMCODE = s.ITEMCODE) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE
CLOSE_CUSTOMER = #{close},
DELIVERY_CUSTOMER = #{delivery},
DELIVERY_LOCATION = #{location},
LABELINFO = #{labelinfo},
LABEL1 = #{label1},
LABEL2 = #{label2},
LABEL3 = #{label3},
LABEL4 = #{label4},
LABEL5 = #{label5},
LOGINID = #{loginid}, YMDHMS = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( ITEMCODE, CLOSE_CUSTOMER, DELIVERY_CUSTOMER, DELIVERY_LOCATION, LABELINFO, LABEL1, LABEL2, LABEL3, LABEL4, LABEL5, USEYN, LOGINID, YMDHMS ) VALUES ( #{itemcode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{close, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{delivery, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{location, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{labelinfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{label1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{label2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{label3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{label4, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{label5, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'Y', #{loginid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM T_WMS_SEQUENCE_INFO ORDER BY SDATE DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_WMS_SEQUENCE_INFO ( SDATE, COLORNAME, MATERIAL, REGION, CAR, COLORCODE, ROW1_HEADREST, ROW1_HCODE, ROW2_HEADREST, ROW2_SEAT, ROW2_HCODE, LIMOUSINE, ROW3_HEADREST, ROW3_HCODE, ROW1_LH_CODE, ROW1_RH_CODE, ROW2_LH_CODE, ROW2_RH_CODE, ROW2_CTR_CODE, ROW3_LH_CODE, ROW3_RH_CODE, ROW3_CTR_CODE, LX2_PE_CODE ) VALUES ( #{sdate}, #{colorname}, #{material}, #{region}, #{car}, #{colorcode}, #{row1_headrest}, #{row1_hcode}, #{row2_headrest}, #{row2_seat}, #{row2_hcode}, #{limousine}, #{row3_headrest}, #{row3_hcode}, #{row1_lh_code}, #{row1_rh_code}, #{row2_lh_code}, #{row2_rh_code}, #{row2_ctr_code}, #{row3_lh_code}, #{row3_rh_code}, #{row3_ctr_code}, #{lx2_pe_code} )
